# raw/

Stage 2 acquisition stores source downloads here.

**Generated by:** Stage 2 acquisition/extraction
**Modified by:** usually never; files are kept as-is so provenance stays visible

## What lives here

- HTML pages, TXT downloads, PDFs, or other original source files
- One file per source asset, named after its origin

## How to read it

- Start from `../README.md` to see which source was chosen and why.
- Then read the extracted text in `../extracted/` or `../clean/`.
